title: Setup Kubernetes infrastructure and databases (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Provision all required databases and infrastructure services including PostgreSQL, Redis/Valkey, Kafka, MongoDB, RabbitMQ, and SeaweedFS using CRDs
details: Deploy CloudNative-PG PostgreSQL cluster, Valkey Redis, Strimzi Kafka, Percona MongoDB, RabbitMQ cluster, and SeaweedFS for object storage. Configure namespaces, network policies, and resource quotas.
testStrategy: All CRDs deploy successfully, databases are reachable from test pods, health checks pass, persistent storage is provisioned

decisionPoints.description: Database sizing and resource allocation strategy

title: Configure Kubernetes networking and ingress (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Setup ingress controllers, load balancers, and service mesh for inter-service communication
details: Deploy NGINX ingress controller, configure TLS termination, setup service mesh for secure service-to-service communication, and configure external LoadBalancer services.
testStrategy: External traffic reaches services through ingress, TLS certificates are valid, service mesh connectivity verified between namespaces

title: Setup observability stack (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Deploy Prometheus, Grafana, and logging infrastructure for monitoring and observability
details: Deploy Prometheus Operator, Grafana with AlertHub dashboards, ELK/Loki stack for centralized logging, and Jaeger for distributed tracing.
testStrategy: Metrics are scraped from all services, Grafana dashboards display data, logs are centralized and searchable, traces are collected

title: Create Rust notification router service skeleton (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Initialize Rust project with Axum framework, basic routing, and project structure
details: Setup Cargo.toml with Axum 0.7, tokio, sqlx dependencies. Create basic project structure with main.rs, routes, handlers, and models modules.
testStrategy: Service compiles successfully, basic health endpoint responds, Docker image builds

decisionPoints.description: Database ORM choice for Rust service

title: Implement notification data models (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Define Rust structs for Notification, NotificationStatus, and related domain models with serialization
details: Create notification.rs with Notification struct, NotificationStatus enum, Priority enum, Channel enum. Implement Serialize/Deserialize traits and database mapping.
testStrategy: Models compile, serialize/deserialize correctly, database migrations create expected schema

title: Setup PostgreSQL connection and migrations (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Configure sqlx database connection pool and create initial database migrations
details: Setup sqlx connection pool with PostgreSQL, create migrations for notifications table, implement database configuration from environment variables.
testStrategy: Database connection established, migrations run successfully, connection pool handles concurrent requests

title: Implement notification submission endpoint (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Create POST /api/v1/notifications endpoint with validation, rate limiting, and database persistence
details: Implement notification submission handler with request validation, tenant-based rate limiting using Redis, notification persistence, and JSON response.
testStrategy: Endpoint accepts valid notifications, rejects invalid payloads, applies rate limiting, persists to database

title: Setup Redis integration for caching and rate limiting (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Integrate Redis client for rate limiting, deduplication cache, and session management
details: Add redis crate, implement connection pool, create rate limiting middleware using sliding window, implement notification deduplication with TTL.
testStrategy: Redis connection established, rate limiting works correctly, deduplication prevents duplicate notifications within TTL window

title: Implement Kafka producer for event streaming (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Setup Kafka producer to publish notification events to integration service
details: Integrate rdkafka crate, implement async Kafka producer, publish notification events with proper serialization and error handling.
testStrategy: Events successfully published to Kafka, producer handles connection failures gracefully, messages are properly formatted

title: Add batch notification endpoint (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Implement POST /api/v1/notifications/batch for submitting up to 100 notifications at once
details: Create batch submission handler with array validation, transaction processing, partial failure handling, and bulk database operations.
testStrategy: Batch endpoint processes multiple notifications, handles partial failures correctly, respects 100 notification limit

title: Implement WebSocket endpoint for real-time updates (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Create WS /api/v1/ws endpoint for real-time notification status updates to clients
details: Setup WebSocket handler with connection management, tenant-based message filtering, connection cleanup, and heartbeat mechanism.
testStrategy: WebSocket connections established, clients receive real-time updates for their notifications, connections handle disconnects gracefully

title: Add Prometheus metrics endpoint (Rex - Rust/Axum)
description: Implement /metrics endpoint with custom metrics for notifications, rate limits, and performance
details: Integrate prometheus crate, implement custom metrics collection for notification counts, latency histograms, rate limiting, and system health.
testStrategy: Metrics endpoint returns valid Prometheus format, custom metrics track notification flow, Grafana can scrape metrics

title: Create Node.js integration service skeleton (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Initialize Bun project with Elysia framework and Effect TypeScript setup
details: Setup package.json with Bun runtime, Elysia 1.x, Effect 3.x dependencies. Create project structure with routes, services, and Effect layer patterns.
testStrategy: Service runs with Bun, Elysia server responds, Effect imports work correctly, Docker image builds

title: Setup MongoDB connection with Drizzle ORM (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Configure MongoDB connection and Drizzle ORM for integration configuration storage
details: Setup Drizzle ORM with MongoDB adapter, create integration schema, configure connection pooling and database configuration.
testStrategy: MongoDB connection established, Drizzle schemas work with MongoDB, connection pool handles concurrent requests

title: Implement Effect Schema models for integrations (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Create Effect Schema definitions for Integration models and channel-specific configurations
details: Define Integration schema with Effect Schema, create channel-specific config schemas (Slack, Discord, Email, Webhook), implement validation and serialization.
testStrategy: Schemas validate correctly, type inference works, validation errors are descriptive, serialization roundtrip succeeds

title: Create Slack integration service with Effect (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Implement SlackService using Effect for webhook and Bot API delivery with retry logic
details: Create SlackService with Effect.Layer, implement webhook and Bot API delivery, add Effect.retry with exponential backoff, handle rate limiting.
testStrategy: Slack messages deliver successfully, retry logic works on failures, rate limiting is respected, Effect errors are properly typed

title: Create Discord integration service (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Implement DiscordService using Effect for webhook delivery to Discord channels
details: Create DiscordService with Effect patterns, implement webhook delivery, handle Discord-specific rate limiting and embed formatting.
testStrategy: Discord messages deliver successfully, embeds format correctly, rate limiting respected, service integrates with Effect layers

title: Create email integration service (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Implement EmailService using Effect for SMTP delivery with template support
details: Create EmailService with Effect, integrate SMTP client, implement template rendering with Effect error handling, support SendGrid and AWS SES.
testStrategy: Emails deliver successfully via SMTP, templates render correctly, Effect error handling works for delivery failures

title: Setup Kafka consumer for notification events (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Implement Effect Stream based Kafka consumer to process notification events from router service
details: Create Kafka consumer using Effect Stream, implement event processing pipeline, handle deserialization and routing to appropriate delivery services.
testStrategy: Kafka messages consumed successfully, events routed to correct delivery services, consumer handles connection failures gracefully

title: Implement webhook delivery service (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Create WebhookService for custom HTTP endpoint delivery with signature verification
details: Create WebhookService with Effect HttpClient, implement signature verification, custom headers support, and webhook retry logic.
testStrategy: Webhooks deliver to custom endpoints, signatures verify correctly, custom headers included, retries work on failures

title: Add integration CRUD endpoints (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
description: Implement REST endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting integrations
details: Create Elysia routes for integration CRUD operations with Effect validation, proper error handling, and tenant isolation.
testStrategy: All CRUD operations work correctly, validation rejects invalid data, tenant isolation enforced, Effect error types returned properly

title: Create Go admin API service skeleton (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Initialize Go project with gRPC server and grpc-gateway for REST API generation
details: Setup Go module with gRPC dependencies, create protobuf definitions for services, implement basic gRPC server with grpc-gateway REST mapping.
testStrategy: gRPC server starts successfully, protobuf compiles, grpc-gateway generates REST endpoints, Docker image builds

title: Define protobuf schemas for all services (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Create comprehensive protobuf definitions for TenantService, UserService, RuleService, and AnalyticsService
details: Define all gRPC services, messages, and enums in protobuf files. Include proper field validation, pagination, and error handling patterns.
testStrategy: Protobuf compiles successfully, generates Go code, grpc-gateway annotations create REST endpoints, validation rules work

title: Setup PostgreSQL connection and GORM models (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Configure PostgreSQL connection with GORM and create Go models for tenants, users, and rules
details: Setup GORM with PostgreSQL driver, create Go structs for domain models, implement database migrations, configure connection pooling.
testStrategy: Database connection established, GORM models map correctly to tables, migrations create expected schema, connection pool works

title: Implement TenantService CRUD operations (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Create tenant management service with create, read, update, and list operations
details: Implement TenantService gRPC methods with proper validation, database operations, and error handling. Include tenant settings management.
testStrategy: All tenant CRUD operations work via gRPC and REST, validation rejects invalid data, proper error responses returned

title: Implement JWT authentication middleware (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Create JWT authentication and authorization middleware for gRPC services
details: Implement JWT token validation, user authentication, role-based authorization, and token refresh logic with Redis for session management.
testStrategy: JWT tokens validate correctly, unauthorized requests rejected, role-based access works, token refresh mechanism functional

title: Implement UserService with RBAC (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Create user management service with role-based access control and preferences management
details: Implement UserService gRPC methods with RBAC (owner, admin, member, viewer), user preferences, and password management.
testStrategy: User CRUD operations work, RBAC enforces access control, user preferences persist correctly, password operations secure

title: Implement notification rules engine (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Create RuleService for managing notification filtering and routing rules
details: Implement rule creation, evaluation engine with conditions and actions, rule priority handling, and rule testing functionality.
testStrategy: Rules evaluate correctly against notifications, priority ordering works, rule conditions support all operators, rule testing provides accurate results

title: Implement AnalyticsService for metrics (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Create analytics service for notification statistics and delivery metrics aggregation
details: Implement analytics data aggregation, time-series metrics calculation, dashboard data preparation, and report generation.
testStrategy: Analytics data aggregates correctly, time-series queries perform well, dashboard APIs return expected metrics, reports generate successfully

title: Setup Redis for session management and caching (Grizz - Go/gRPC)
description: Integrate Redis client for JWT session management and analytics caching
details: Setup Redis client with connection pooling, implement session storage for JWT tokens, cache analytics results, and handle Redis connection failures.
testStrategy: Redis connection established, sessions persist correctly, analytics cache improves performance, graceful fallback when Redis unavailable

title: Create Next.js web console project (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Initialize Next.js 15 project with App Router, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS, and Effect setup
details: Setup Next.js with App Router, install shadcn/ui components, configure TailwindCSS 4, setup Effect 3.x with TypeScript, create basic project structure.
testStrategy: Next.js app builds and runs, shadcn/ui components work, TailwindCSS styles apply, Effect imports function correctly

decisionPoints.description: State management strategy for UI state

title: Setup Effect Schema for API validation (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Create Effect Schema definitions for all API requests and responses with validation
details: Define Effect Schema models for notifications, integrations, users, and rules. Setup validation and type generation for API interactions.
testStrategy: Schemas validate API responses correctly, type inference works in components, validation errors are descriptive and handled properly

title: Create dashboard with notification overview (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Build main dashboard page with notification metrics, recent activity, and status overview
details: Create dashboard page with notification counters, recent notification feed, delivery status charts, and quick actions using shadcn/ui components.
testStrategy: Dashboard loads and displays metrics correctly, recent notifications update in real-time, charts render properly, responsive design works

title: Implement WebSocket integration with Effect Stream (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Setup WebSocket connection using Effect Stream for real-time notification updates
details: Create WebSocket client using Effect Stream, handle connection management, implement reconnection logic, and integrate with React components.
testStrategy: WebSocket connects successfully, receives real-time updates, handles disconnections gracefully, integrates properly with React state

title: Create notification history page with filtering (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Build notification history page with search, filtering, pagination, and detailed views
details: Create notification history page with search functionality, filter by status/channel/date, pagination, and notification detail modal.
testStrategy: Search and filters work correctly, pagination handles large datasets, detail views show complete notification information, performance acceptable

title: Implement integration management interface (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Create integration management page with CRUD operations and OAuth flows
details: Build integration management page with create/edit forms, OAuth connection flows, test integration functionality, and integration status monitoring.
testStrategy: Integration CRUD operations work, OAuth flows complete successfully, test functionality validates integrations, status updates in real-time

title: Build visual notification rules builder (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Create drag-and-drop interface for building notification rules with conditions and actions
details: Build visual rule builder with drag-and-drop conditions, action configuration, rule testing interface, and rule priority management.
testStrategy: Rule builder creates valid rules, drag-and-drop works smoothly, rule testing provides accurate results, complex rules can be created easily

title: Create analytics dashboard with charts (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Build analytics page with delivery metrics, performance charts, and reporting features
details: Create analytics dashboard using recharts for visualization, time range selection, metric comparison, and export functionality.
testStrategy: Charts display metrics correctly, time range filtering works, chart interactions are responsive, export functionality generates reports

title: Implement dark/light theme support (Blaze - React/Next.js)
description: Add theme switching functionality with system preference detection and persistence
details: Implement theme context, update shadcn/ui components for theme support, add theme toggle, persist theme preference, and support system preference detection.
testStrategy: Theme switching works across all components, preferences persist across sessions, system preference detection works, no visual glitches during theme changes

title: Create Expo mobile app project (Tap - Expo)
description: Initialize Expo SDK 50 project with React Native, NativeWind, and navigation setup
details: Setup Expo project with SDK 50, install NativeWind for styling, configure React Navigation with tab and stack navigators, setup basic project structure.
testStrategy: Expo app builds and runs on simulator/device, navigation works correctly, NativeWind styles apply, app compiles without errors

title: Implement push notification registration (Tap - Expo)
description: Setup FCM/APNs push notification registration and handling in mobile app
details: Integrate Expo Notifications, setup FCM and APNs configuration, implement device token registration, handle notification permissions.
testStrategy: Push notifications register successfully, device tokens sent to backend, notification permissions handled correctly, test notifications received

title: Create notification feed screen (Tap - Expo)
description: Build main notification feed with pull-to-refresh and notification details
details: Create notification feed screen with FlatList, pull-to-refresh functionality, notification detail navigation, and offline caching.
testStrategy: Notification feed loads and displays correctly, pull-to-refresh works, detail navigation functions, offline caching provides good UX

title: Implement biometric authentication (Tap - Expo)
description: Add Face ID/fingerprint authentication for app security
details: Integrate Expo LocalAuthentication, implement biometric authentication flow, handle fallback authentication, and secure storage integration.
testStrategy: Biometric authentication works on supported devices, fallback works when biometrics unavailable, authentication state persists correctly

title: Create Electron desktop app (Spark - Electron)
description: Initialize Electron 28 project with React and system tray integration
details: Setup Electron with React, implement main and renderer processes, create system tray integration, and basic window management.
testStrategy: Electron app builds and launches, system tray integration works, main/renderer IPC communication functional, app packages correctly

title: Implement native desktop notifications (Spark - Electron)
description: Add native desktop notification support with action buttons and system integration
details: Implement native notification API, add action buttons, handle notification clicks, integrate with system notification center, and manage notification permissions.
testStrategy: Native notifications display correctly, action buttons work, notification clicks navigate appropriately, system integration functions properly

title: Add global keyboard shortcuts (Spark - Electron)
description: Implement global keyboard shortcuts for quick access and notification management
details: Register global shortcuts for show/hide window, quick notification view, mute notifications, and other common actions.
testStrategy: Global shortcuts work system-wide, shortcuts don't conflict with other apps, shortcuts can be customized, shortcuts work across platforms

title: Deploy services to Kubernetes (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Create Kubernetes deployments, services, and ingress for all backend services
details: Create Kubernetes manifests for all services, implement HPA, configure ingress routing, setup service discovery, and implement health checks.
testStrategy: All services deploy successfully, health checks pass, services can communicate, ingress routing works, HPA scales appropriately

title: Configure production monitoring and alerting (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Setup comprehensive monitoring, alerting, and log aggregation for production
details: Configure Prometheus alerting rules, setup Grafana dashboards, implement log aggregation, create SLA monitoring, and setup incident response.
testStrategy: Monitoring captures all critical metrics, alerts fire correctly, logs are searchable and retained, SLA dashboards show accurate data

options: 7 days local, archive to object storage

title: Setup CI/CD pipeline for all services (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Create GitHub Actions workflows for building, testing, and deploying all services
details: Setup GitHub Actions for each service, implement automated testing, container building, security scanning, and automated deployment to Kubernetes.
testStrategy: All services build automatically on changes, tests run and must pass, container images build and scan successfully, deployments trigger correctly

title: End-to-end testing and integration validation (Bolt - Kubernetes)
description: Create comprehensive end-to-end tests validating complete notification flow across all services
details: Setup E2E testing framework, create tests for complete notification flow (submit -> route -> deliver -> display), validate WebSocket updates, test mobile push notifications.
testStrategy: E2E tests pass consistently, all notification channels deliver successfully, real-time updates work across clients, mobile push notifications received
